description: Pre-aggregate and cache heavy dashboard queries so p99 stays under 800ms on the largest pilot dataset.
summary: Reduce dashboard query p99 under 800ms

description: Migrate legacy dashboard request logs to structured JSON to trace slow queries by customer.
summary: Migrate dashboard request logs to structured format

summary: Cohort comparison widget for retention by signup month

description: Stabilize flaky chart-render snapshot tests blocking merges before feature freeze.
summary: Stabilize flaky chart-render tests in CI

summary: Write pilot rollout runbook

description: Reserve layout space so the dashboard header stops shifting when the date-range picker loads.

description: Add rate-limit headers to the public analytics API so enterprise scripts can back off gracefully.

description: Backfill missing customer_id tags on historical export jobs so per-account latency dashboards are complete.
